text.title: Requirements Documentation Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact produced by this methodology, paired with a valid + invalid example.

example.code: { "req_id": "SR-0042", "type": "SR", "title": "Partial-invoice exception path", "description": "System must support partial-invoice exception path with auditor-visible justification field.", "acceptance_criteria": [ "Given an invoice with partial payment, the system records the operator's justification.", "Given missing justification, the system blocks the operation." ], "source_citations": [ "ES-0014", "ES-0017" ], "status": "approved", "owner": "Finance Ops", "parent": "BR-0019" }
example.note: Conforms to the schema; required fields present, enums respected.
Missing required fields and / or violates pattern constraints.

forbidden.pattern: Top-level object missing any of the required fields.
Free-form additional properties not listed in the schema.
Enum field value outside the declared set.

text.reference: Validates an artefact against this schema.
